scope: B8.2 multi-seed stability replication -- PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (committed + hash-pinned BEFORE run).
status: development-only | NOT confirmatory | NOT deployable | NOT validation (Lee2019 SM16 emulator) | NO tag
authorized: reviewer-authorized 2026-07-07 after B8.1 (MEETS pre-registered targets on emulator, modest, masking-dependent). B8.2 asks ONLY: is B8.1's decision-level prior control + mixed-cell control + POS signal STABLE across multiple fresh seed blocks? It does NOT ask how to raise power, does NOT fix the mean-T collider, does NOT validate on real data.

locked_engine.worker: realeeg_b8_1_canary.py (REUSED VERBATIM; byte-identical to committed B8.1)
locked_engine.guarantee: NO logic/gate/statistic/feature change vs B8.1. The exact class-balanced contract (design_class Dc=y0 pre-assignment; C balanced-randomized within (block,Dc); hard provenance gate H3), the exact both-gate decision, the exact B3 contrast T, and the exact feature cache. HARD-STOP if any B8.1 logic changes.

locked_decision.B8_ALERT: contract_valid AND estimable (n_exact_invalid<=0.20*n_boot) AND p_exact_meanT<=0.025 AND p_exact_stud<=0.025 AND n_eligible>=20  (== B8.1 both-gate, UNCHANGED)
locked_decision.no_retuning: do NOT change any gate based on prior_only or POS results

replication.seed_formula: seed = base + world_index*STRIDE(1e6) + cohort; each base = one seed block
replication.disjointness: VERIFIED 0 intersection with all 11980 prior CSC seeds (B8.0/B8.1/B7/B6/R1/P3/B5/smoke); 6 bases mutually disjoint (spaced 20e6, each spans 11e6+49)

primary_question: Is B8.1's decision-level (both-gate) prior_only control, cov_plus_prior mixed control, and POS signal STABLE across 6 fresh seed blocks? per-seed variability is the CORE output, not an appendix.

screens_preregistered.no_pooling: each NULL kind reported SEPARATELY; no pooled safety claim
screens_preregistered.also_report_for_nulls: mean-T-alone alert count + both-gate alert count + studentized-gate contribution. If prior_only both-gate passes but mean-T-alone stays high -> write 'decision-level controlled, statistic-level collider remains.'
screens_preregistered.violations: ALERT <= 7/300 each; more importantly CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_UNIDENTIFIABLE should DOMINATE. For VIOLATION_quiet_cov_plus_concept: success = refuse because contract invalid, NOT alert because a true concept exists.

decision_tree.A_safety_stable_pos_strong: prior_only<=7 AND cov_plus_prior<=7 AND violations refuse AND POS_boundary>=20 -> B8 direction strong enough to discuss B8.3 budget frontier OR real randomized-audit protocol (reviewer)
decision_tree.B_safety_stable_pos_weak: -> audit/label budget frontier (power = design-budget question, NOT statistic-tuning)
decision_tree.C_prior_only_fails: do NOT recalibrate mean-T gate -> means class-balanced contract controls prior unstably or by masking -> contract redesign or narrow estimand
decision_tree.D_mixed_fails: undermines the main B8 positive -> STOP + diagnose contract construction
decision_tree.E_violation_alerts: contract validator failure, NOT a concept result -> fix provenance/invalid-state logic before any science claim

hard_stops: any use of outcome Y as design_class
any violation world bypassing provenance refusal
